testcase.name: graphIsConsistentAfterBulkIngestion
testcase.system-out: 2026-05-17T18:05:55.568+05:30 INFO 264684 --- [service-dependency-analyzer] [o-auto-1-exec-6] c.d.graph.ingestion.EventProducer : Ingestion batch starting requestedCount=1000 testcase.name: bulk1000EventsQueueDrainsCompletely

testcase.name: graphHasEdgesAfterBulkIngestion
